monitor_the_situation.title: Trump Announces US Naval Blockade of All Iranian Ports and Oil Terminals, Starting Tuesday, Warns Neutral Ships to Leave or Face Fire, Imposes 20% Toll on Strait of Hormuz Transit, Escalating Tensions
— S4 · Political · Strait of Hormuz · 5h ago. The US Army announces a naval blockade on all Iranian ports, effective from 20:00 GMT tomorrow.
US Strikes Oil Infrastructure at Iran's Kharg Island Terminal
Iran Launches Continued Drone Attacks on US Bases in Iraq
— S4 · Conflict · Baghdad, Iraq · 19h ago. Iran's army continues drone attacks targeting US military bases in Iraq amid the ongoing US-Iran conflict.
US and Iran Trade Heavy Missile and Drone Attacks in Persian Gulf
